# Shopease Foods Inc.

> Family-run food delivery service in Peterborough, Ontario, serving Ontario
> families since 1984. Tagline: "When it comes to food, we deliver."

## What we do
Shopease builds customized food orders for families: premium all-natural meat
from local Ontario farms (beef, pork, poultry, lamb), wild-caught fish,
restaurant-quality frozen foods you can't get in grocery stores (chicken
strips, chicken burgers, lasagne, ravioli, cheesecakes), and brand-name
pantry staples. A dedicated Food Planner builds each order item by item with
the customer by phone; meat is cut and packaged to the customer's
instructions; everything is delivered to the customer's door.

## Key facts
- Founded 1984; family-owned; owner Steve Gunsolus (third owner in 40 years)
- Address: 7-774 Rye Street, Peterborough, ON K9J 6W9, Canada
- Phone: (705) 745-4242 · Toll-free: (800) 361-3418 · Text: (705) 304-0080
- Email: info@shopeasefoods.com
- Service area: Ontario, Canada
- Plans: customizable, typically 6-12 months, weekly / bi-weekly / monthly
  payments (on approved credit), or a discount for payment in full
- 36-month price lock on re-orders; 12-month quality guarantee
- Free, no-obligation consult; 2-minute intake survey on the website
- Referral program: referred friends get $100 off their first order;
  referrers earn escalating rewards up to $3,000 in groceries

## Pages
- Home: https://www.shopeasefoods.com/
- Referral rewards: https://www.shopeasefoods.com/referral.html
- Survey: linked from the home page ("Take the Survey")
- Privacy: https://www.shopeasefoods.com/privacy.html
- Terms: https://www.shopeasefoods.com/terms.html
